value.found_quote: Install the security-guidance plugin to have Claude review its own code changes for vulnerabilities and fix them in the same session.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Security Guidance Plugin as an in-session plugin that makes Claude review its own code changes for vulnerabilities and fix them in the same session. It also describes multiple layers of review: a deterministic per-edit pattern check (no model call) and model-backed end-of-turn and commit reviews — matching the claim about "deterministic and model-backed layers." The page treats this as a generally available offering ("The plugin is available on all plans."), indicating active status.
